subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down the rain as He willeth and causeth it to descend according to His desire. Glorified be He Who hath sent down His bounty as He pleaseth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انزل الغیث کیف اراد و ینزله کیف یرید سبحان الذی انزل النعمه کیف شاء
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @business; financial; property matters, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @work as worship, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
